pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.5 to support Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; compilation and runtime will fail due to incompatible bytecode and API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set Java compiler source and target to version 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit target 21, the build may produce bytecode incompatible with the target JDK or fail to compile new language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add compiler arguments to open restricted Java modules for reflection access.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 21 enforces strong encapsulation; libraries using deep reflection on java.lang or sun.misc will throw InaccessibleObjectException at runtime without these flags.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JVM arguments to open restricted Java modules for the Spring Boot application.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime reflection on internal JDK classes will fail with InaccessibleObjectException on Java 21 without these flags.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JVM arguments to open restricted Java modules for the Surefire test runner.
pom.xml.why_exists: Tests using reflection on internal JDK classes will fail with InaccessibleObjectException on Java 21 without these flags.
